scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:users" "npm run dev:posts" "npm run dev:media" "npm run dev:feed" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:common && npm run build:services && npm run build:web
scripts.build:services: concurrently "npm run build:auth" "npm run build:users" "npm run build:posts" "npm run build:media" "npm run build:feed"
scripts.test: npm run test:common && npm run test:services && npm run test:web
scripts.test:services: concurrently "npm run test:auth" "npm run test:users" "npm run test:posts" "npm run test:media" "npm run test:feed"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:services && npm run install:web
scripts.install:services: concurrently "cd apps/auth-svc && npm install" "cd apps/users-svc && npm install" "cd apps/posts-svc && npm install" "cd apps/media-svc && npm install" "cd apps/feed-svc && npm install"
scripts.clean: npm run clean:node_modules && npm run clean:dist
